title: War of Nations – Team System Mod
description: War of Nations introduces a fully-featured custom team system for Minecraft servers.
body:
Features

### Custom Teams

Create, rename, recolor, and delete teams with unique IDs, display names, and colors.

Neutral team always exists to hold unassigned players.

Data is persisted in JSON files across restarts.

### Player Management

Players can switch teams themselves, check their info, and list all available teams.

Admins can assign players, balance team sizes, and view historical stats.

### Chat Integration

Team names and colors show in chat.

Neutral players remain uncolored until assigned.

### War & Home System

Players can set team homes.

Teleport to your team’s home with cooldowns.

Declare wars and track ongoing conflicts.

### Statistics & Debugging

Online team distribution with percentages.

Historical assignments and ratios.

Debug commands for quick inspection.

### 🛠 Player Commands (/customteam)

/customteam list – list all existing teams.

/customteam info – show your current team.

/customteam switch <team> – switch to another team.

/customteam home – teleport to your team’s home.

/customteam sethome – set your team’s home position.

/customteam war declare <team> – declare war on another team.

/customteam war end <team> – end a war with another team.

/customteam war list – list ongoing wars.

### 🛡 Admin Commands (/teamadmin)

/teamadmin team create <id> <color> <displayName...> – create a new team.

/teamadmin team delete <id> – delete a team.

/teamadmin team rename <id> <newDisplay...> – rename a team.

/teamadmin team color <id> <color> – change team color.

/teamadmin team list – show all teams.

/teamadmin assign <player> <team> – assign a player to a team.

/teamadmin list – list online players and their teams.

/teamadmin listall – all-time assignments and totals.

/teamadmin stats – online team distribution with percentages.

/teamadmin debug teams – debug summary of team data.

### 📦 Installation

Install Fabric Loader
.

Place the War of Nations .jar into your server’s mods folder.

Restart your server.

Create your first teams with /teamadmin team create.

### ⚡ Example Setup
/teamadmin team create redteam red "Red Warriors"
/teamadmin team create blueteam blue "Blue Knights"
/teamadmin assign Steve redteam
/customteam switch blueteam
/customteam sethome
/customteam war declare redteam
